"use client"; import { DashboardLayout } from "@/components/layout/DashboardLayout"; import { Calendar, Filter, Clock, MapPin, Users, Plus } from "lucide-react"; export default function CoordinatorClassesPage() { return (

Class Schedules

Review timetables and allocate lecture halls.

Today's Active Classes

{[ { time: "09:00 - 11:00", subject: "DBMS Lab", faculty: "Dr. Priya Mehta", room: "Lab-3", type: "Lab", status: "Ongoing" }, { time: "11:15 - 12:15", subject: "Computer Networks", faculty: "Prof. Anita Desai", room: "Room 104", type: "Lecture", status: "Upcoming" }, { time: "13:15 - 14:15", subject: "Software Engineering", faculty: "Prof. Kavita Nair", room: "Room 101", type: "Lecture", status: "Upcoming" }, { time: "14:15 - 15:15", subject: "Algorithms", faculty: "Prof. Rajan Kumar", room: "Room 102", type: "Lecture", status: "Upcoming" }, ].map((cls, i) => (
{cls.time}

{cls.subject}

{cls.type}
{cls.faculty}
{cls.room}
))}
); }

"use client"; import { DashboardLayout } from "@/components/layout/DashboardLayout"; import { FileText, Plus, Search, Calendar, MapPin, Clock } from "lucide-react"; import { DEMO_EXAMS } from "@/lib/demo-data"; export default function CoordinatorExamsPage() { return (

Exam Schedules

Manage examination dates and invigilation duties.

Upcoming Examinations

{DEMO_EXAMS.map((exam, i) => (
{new Date(exam.date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}

{exam.subject}

{exam.type}
{exam.time}
{exam.duration}
Main Block Halls
))}
); }

"use client"; import { DashboardLayout } from "@/components/layout/DashboardLayout"; import { Bell, Plus, Edit2, Trash2, Calendar as CalendarIcon, Pin } from "lucide-react"; import { DEMO_NOTICES } from "@/lib/demo-data"; export default function ManageNoticesPage() { return (

Campus Notices

Publish and manage announcements for students and faculty.

{DEMO_NOTICES.map((notice, i) => (
{i === 0 && }

{notice.title}

{notice.type}

{notice.body}

Published: {notice.date}
By: {notice.author}
))}
); }

"use client"; import { DashboardLayout } from "@/components/layout/DashboardLayout"; import { User, Mail, Phone, MapPin, Briefcase } from "lucide-react"; import { useAuth } from "@/lib/auth-context"; export default function CoordinatorProfilePage() { const { userProfile } = useAuth(); return (
{userProfile?.name?.charAt(0) || "C"}

{userProfile?.name || "Coordinator Name"}

Academic Coordinator

Contact Information

Email Address

{userProfile?.email || "coordinator@college.edu"}

Phone Number

{userProfile?.phone || "+91 99887 76655"}

Office Details

Office Location

Main Administrative Block, Room A102

 ); }

"use client"; import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useAuth } from "@/lib/auth-context"; import { DashboardLayout } from "@/components/layout/DashboardLayout"; import { DEMO_TIMETABLE, DEMO_NOTICES, DEMO_STUDENTS } from "@/lib/demo-data"; import { getCurrentDay, formatDate, getGreetingTime } from "@/lib/utils"; import { Users, Bell, ClipboardList, ChevronRight, TrendingUp, Calendar } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; export default function FacultyDashboard() { const { userProfile } = useAuth(); const now = new Date(); const today = getCurrentDay(); const todayClasses = DEMO_TIMETABLE[today] || []; const [greeting, setGreeting] = useState(""); useEffect(() => { setTimeout(() => setGreeting(getGreetingTime()), 0); const timeInterval = setInterval(() => setGreeting(getGreetingTime()), 60000); return () => clearInterval(timeInterval); }, []); // Faculty's own classes const myClasses = todayClasses.filter(c => c.faculty === (userProfile?.name || "Dr. Priya Mehta")); const presentCount = DEMO_STUDENTS.filter(s => s.status === "present").length; const attendanceRate = Math.round((presentCount / DEMO_STUDENTS.length) * 100); return ( {/* Welcome */}

Good {greeting || getGreetingTime()},{" "} {userProfile?.name?.split(" ").slice(-1)[0] || "Professor"} 👩‍🏫

{now.toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { weekday: "long", day: "numeric", month: "long", year: "numeric" })}

{/* Stat cards */}
My Classes Today

{myClasses.length}

Take attendance ›

Today's Attend.

{attendanceRate}%

{presentCount}/{DEMO_STUDENTS.length} present

Total Students

{DEMO_STUDENTS.length}

CS-4A division

Notices Posted

{DEMO_NOTICES.length}

Post new ›

{/* Today's classes */}

My Classes — {today}

Full timetable
{myClasses.length === 0 ? (

No classes assigned today

) : ( myClasses.map((cls, i) => (

{cls.subject}

{cls.time} – {cls.end} Room {cls.room}

Mark
)) )} {/* Show other faculty's classes as well */} {todayClasses.filter(c => c.faculty !== (userProfile?.name || "Dr. Priya Mehta")).slice(0, 2).map((cls, i) => (

{cls.subject}

{cls.time} – {cls.end} {cls.faculty}

))}
{/* Quick attendance summary */}

Attendance Today

Mark all
{attendanceRate}%

{presentCount} Present

{DEMO_STUDENTS.length - presentCount} Absent

Total: {DEMO_STUDENTS.length} students

{DEMO_STUDENTS.slice(0, 5).map(s => (
{s.rollNumber} {s.name} {s.status === "present" ? "P" : "A"}
))}
{/* Quick actions */}

Quick Actions

{[ { href: "/faculty/attendance", label: "Mark Attendance", icon: "✅", glow: "group-hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)] group-hover:border-emerald-500/30" }, { href: "/faculty/exams", label: "Manage Exams", icon: "📝", glow: "group-hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(168,85,247,0.15)] group-hover:border-purple-500/30" }, { href: "/faculty/results", label: "Upload Marks", icon: "🏆", glow: "group-hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.15)] group-hover:border-amber-500/30" }, { href: "/faculty/notices", label: "Post Notice", icon: "📢", glow: "group-hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.15)] group-hover:border-blue-500/30" }, ].map(item => (
{item.icon} {item.label}
))}
); }

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).
